title: Agent avatar component with configurable styling and labels
purpose: Provides a reusable avatar component that displays different styled badges based on agent type and name, used in chat interfaces to visually distinguish different agent roles.
module_context: Exports a type definition for agent avatar kinds and a React component that renders avatars with specific background colors and labels based on agent type and optional name.

steps.content: Determine the background color and label for the avatar based on the agent kind.
For user agents, use the first character of the name as the label or 'U' if name is missing.
For main_agent, use purple background with 'C' label.
For subagent, use green background with 'S' label.
For hook, use yellow background with 'H' label.
For system, use gray background with centered dot label.
Retrieve the background color and label configuration for the specified agent kind.
Set the title attribute to the agent name when the kind is subagent.
Render a styled div element with the configured background color and label.
Apply specific CSS styles for display, sizing, and visual appearance.
